42nd IEEE International Conference on Data Engineering (ICDE) Montréal, Canada - May 4-8, 2026

News

  • May 8, 2026, ICDE/TCDE Awards Announced.

  • May 6, 2026, Announcing the Panelists for "How Should Databases Be Taught in the Future?".

  • May 1, 2026, Announcing the Panelists for "What Can Agentic AI Do for Databases?".

  • April 26, 2026,The distinguished EDI panelists have been announced.

  • April 23, 2026, The ICDE 2026 PhD Symposium Program Details is now available.

  • April 14, 2026, The ICDE 2026 Presentation Instructions Now Available.

  • April 13, 2026, The ICDE 2026 conference app is now available on Whova. Registered attendees can access the full agenda, connect with other participants, and receive updates through the app. Please check your email for the invitation link/code to join the event.

  • April 13, 2026, Coming from a visa-free country? We strongly recommend applying for the e-visa (eTA) well in advance to avoid any delays at the airport.

  • April 13, 2026, the Keynote Talk details are now available!

  • ICDE 2026 does not work with third‑party housing agencies. Please only book accommodations using the official hotel links provided on this website. Unsolicited emails requesting travel or credit card details should be treated with caution.

  • April 4, 2026, Announcement of Andy Pavlo (CMU) and Sharad Mehrotra as TCDE Awards.

  • March 31, 2026, ICDE 2026 Student Volunteer Applications Are Now Open. Register Here.

  • Breaking News: March 23, 2026, early bird registration has been extended to March 27. Register Here.

  • March 23, 2026, ICDE 2026 keynote speakers officially announced.

  • March 23, 2026, the official sponsor list has been released. View the full list here.

  • March 21, 2026, ICDE 2026 Program Details is now available. You can explore the full schedule, sessions, and events on the Conference Program page.

  • March 17, 2026, Accepted Industry and Application, DEFT, and Ph.D. Symposium Papers for ICDE 2026 are Published.

  • March 16, 2026, Accepted Research Papers (Round 1 and 2), Demo Papers, TKDE Posters, and Lightning Talks for ICDE 2026 are Published.

  • ICDE 2026 Program Structure have been released. More to come soon. Stay tuned!

  • Don’t forget to book your stay at the Fairmont Queen Elizabeth conference hotel. Attendees will enjoy the service and amenities of a premier hotel at discounted rates (including student rates). Book through the conference links: Hotel and Conference Venue

  • Early registration deadline ends March 23, 2026. Registration details and link to register: Registration.

  • Student Travel Award applications now open, deadline April 6, 2026. Please visit (Student Travel Awards) for details.

  • Ph.D. Symposium deadline is extended to Feb 1, 2026.

  • Jan 8, 2026, Hotel bookings for ICDE 2026 are now available. Please visit the Hotel and Conference Venue page for details.

  • Dec 17, 2025, Accepted Research Papers for ICDE 2026 in Round 1.

  • Dec 15, 2025, Registration for ICDE 2026 is now open.

  • Dec 15, 2025, The list of accepted workshops has been published online

  • Dec 15, 2025, The list of accepted tutorials has been published online

  • Nov 21, 2025, Instructions for Camera-Ready Submission - ICDE 2026 Research Track

  • Oct 30, 2025, CMT is now open and accepting submissions for the DEFT track. Abstract deadline is Nov 2 5 (Extended by 3 Days to 5 November), and full paper deadline is Nov 9.

  • Oct 20, 2025, The CMT is now open and accepting submissions for the Research Track Round 2.

Welcome to ICDE 2026

The annual IEEE International Conference on Data Engineering (ICDE) is one of the premier conferences in data and information engineering and addresses research issues on designing, building, managing, and evaluating advanced data intensive systems and applications. It is a leading forum for researchers, practitioners, developers, and users to explore cutting-edge ideas and to exchange techniques, tools, and experiences.

Each year, ICDE attracts researchers and practitioners from the academia, industry and government from across the world. The audience includes leading data scientists and professors, entrepreneurs, developers, talented young researchers/students and other thought leaders from major vendors and academia.

ICDE 2026 will be held in Montreal from May 4 to 8, 2026. Situated between the St. Lawrence River and the Rivière des Prairies, Montreal beautifully blends natural beauty with a rich historical backdrop. As one of the oldest cities in North America, it showcases a distinctive mix of French colonial roots, charming cobblestone streets, and historic architecture, all interwoven with modern-day vibrancy. With rivers and green spaces throughout—including the iconic Mount Royal Park at its center—Montreal welcomes visitors to enjoy scenic waterfronts, lush walking paths, and sweeping views. The city’s cultural richness, historic allure, and close ties to nature make it a truly memorable destination.
